docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES #5 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ KRISTINA AKA PLUNKETT KRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
